name: OKF (Open Knowledge Format)
description: Structured knowledge bundles with auto-recall, graph traversal, and agent tools. Three capture modes: agent-driven (always), keyword triggers (always), and auto-capture (feature-flagged, off by default).

bundlePath.description: Path to the OKF bundle directory relative to workspace root

autoRecall.description: Automatically recall relevant OKF concepts before agent turns. Enabled by default — this is the core value of the plugin. Set to false only if you want to use OKF tools manually without auto-injection, or to avoid context budget competition with hybrid-memory.

maxRecallChars.description: Maximum characters to inject from recalled concepts

maxRecallConcepts.description: Maximum number of concepts to recall per turn

minRecallScore.description: Relevance gate: minimum normalized IDF score a concept must reach to be auto-injected. Below this, a match is treated as noise and nothing is surfaced. Raise it to make auto-recall stricter (fewer, higher-confidence concepts); set to 0 to disable this floor.

recallRelevanceRatio.description: Relevance gate: drop any concept scoring below this fraction of the top match's score. Scale-invariant guard that stops one strong hit from dragging in weak, off-topic neighbours. Higher = stricter. Set to 0 to disable.

minMatchedTokens.description: Relevance gate: minimum number of distinct query tokens a concept must match to be auto-injected. A single overlapping common token is usually noise; set to 2 to require at least two-token overlap.

graphDepth.description: Number of hops to traverse when following concept links

watchChanges.description: Watch bundle directory for changes and auto-reindex

autoCapture.description: FEATURE FLAG: Auto-analyze agent turns for documentable knowledge (decisions, playbooks, architecture). Disabled by default. Requires plugins.entries.okf.hooks.allowConversationAccess=true (agent_end is a raw conversation hook). When enabled, requires BOTH user intent signals AND assistant content signals to match before suggesting capture; the suggestion is injected into the next turn and the agent decides whether to write. Will NOT capture model reasoning artifacts or casual conversation.

autoCaptureMinChars.description: Minimum assistant response length before auto-capture considers it

autoCaptureTypes.description: Types of knowledge to auto-capture. Only used when autoCapture is true.

corpusSupplement.description: FEATURE FLAG: When enabled, registers the okf_corpus_search tool which exposes OKF search in a memory_search-compatible format for use by other plugins (e.g., memory-hybrid corpus supplement). Disabled by default.
